@dataclass
class Client:
    id: str
    name: str

exercises.code:
from dataclasses import dataclass, field
@dataclass
class Client:
    id: str
    tags: list = field(default_factory=list)
a, b = Client("1"), Client("2")
a.tags.append("x")
print(a.tags, b.tags)
# D2-Explorer: packet-only re-walk S11 S11-T1-A-E2
exercises.answer:
from dataclasses import dataclass, field
@dataclass
class Client:
    id: str
    tags: list = field(default_factory=list)
a, b = Client("1"), Client("2")
a.tags.append("x")
print(a.tags, b.tags)
exercises.justification_from_packet: [D2-Explorer second full walk from landing] field(default_factory=list) evita default mutable compartido entre instancias. Selfcheck del paquete OOP.
[D2-Explorer second full walk from landing] to_dict serializa el dataclass sin lógica de fraude. Puerto de representación del dominio.

exercises.code:
from dataclasses import dataclass
@dataclass
class RelationshipEvidence:
    signal_score: float
    signals: list
e = RelationshipEvidence(0.4, ["shared_phone"])
print(e.signal_score, e.signals)
print("signal_score es señal numérica, no veredicto de familia")

from dataclasses import dataclass, field
@dataclass
class CaseCard:
    er_score: float
    rel_score: float
    notes: list = field(default_factory=list)
print(CaseCard(0.8, 0.4))
exercises.justification_from_packet: [D2-Explorer second full walk from landing] CaseCard separa er_score y rel_score sin fusionarlos a ciegas. Ficha de caso del dominio.
[D2-Explorer second full walk from landing] Mantener scores etiquetados por separado en la ficha. No un solo número sin etiqueta.
